Edge cases in reading a field's actual current state/label, not the matching logic

Found by re-tracing engine.js/signature.js line by line, not from a live-site report: a dash-wrapped select placeholder ("-- Select --") was read as an already-answered value, and a radio/checkbox option label placed BEFORE the control ("Yes <input>") was never read at all (only the text-after pattern was checked).

Are you legally authorized to work in this country? Yes No 
running…
